name: surgical-teaching-phase1-poc
description: Windows C/S surgical teaching software PoC: 4-channel USB preview, selective recording, local playback index, call workflow and interaction workbench.

scripts.test: npm run test:smoke && npm run test:signaling
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run audit:high && npm run test
scripts.test:smoke: playwright test tests/recording-management.spec.js && playwright test tests/phase2-smoke.spec.js tests/phase3-patient-binding.spec.js && playwright test tests/phase2-signaling-ui.spec.js
